title: Rififi in Amsterdam
writer: Giovanni Korporaal, Emile Brumsteede, W.H. van Eemlandt
actors: Maxim Hamel, Johan Kaart, Jan Blaaser
plot: Criminal Bert Oliemans, just released from prison, has a problem. Both the victim, the police and a rival gang want to know where he hid the jewels prior to his arrest.
